🔧 Diagnostics

Admin Panel

Create New Room

0/50 characters

IPv4 (192.168.x.x) or hostname (esp32-room.local)

💡 How to find your ESP32 address:

  • Check your WiFi router for connected devices
  • Look at ESP32 serial output for IP address
  • Use mDNS hostname like esp32-livingroom.local

Define Device in Room

PIN_SW1=33, PIN_SW2=18
